🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 7.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 16.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and the 1.3m swell, it'll either be strangely rideable or a complete waste of wax.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
